---
title: "Long Paths and 8.3 Filename Troubleshooting"
format: gfm
execute:
  echo: true
  output: true
  warning: true
  message: true
---

```{r setup}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy diagnostic intent

The legacy project carried lengthy troubleshooting comments about Windows long paths, 8.3 short filenames, and reader fallbacks.  The current production implementation is in `R/io/read_long_paths.R`; this analysis note keeps the troubleshooting material out of production code while rendering runnable current-code analogs directly.

```{r long-path-source-current-functions}
source(analysis_path("R", "io", "read_long_paths.R"))
read_with_short_path
get_windows_short_path
normalize_path_for_os
```

```{r long-path-current-reader-contract}
tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")
write.csv(data.frame(x = 1:2), tmp, row.names = FALSE)
read_csv_short(tmp)
data.frame(
  current_code_analog = c(
    "normalize_path_for_os(tmp)",
    "get_windows_short_path(tmp)",
    "read_csv_short(tmp)"
  ),
  result = c(
    normalize_path_for_os(tmp),
    get_windows_short_path(tmp),
    paste(names(read_csv_short(tmp)), collapse = ", ")
  )
)
```
